slides.headline: Three strategic imperatives will unlock $2.4B in shareholder value over the next five years
bullets: Core retail margins have declined 340bps since 2023, driven by rising input costs and channel fragmentation — immediate operational restructuring can recover 200bps within 18 months
Digital commerce penetration at 12% lags peer median of 28%, representing a $680M incremental revenue opportunity through accelerated omnichannel investment
Supply chain consolidation across 14 regional warehouses into 5 mega-distribution centers will reduce logistics cost by $190M annually while improving delivery speed by 2 days
Workforce reskilling program targeting 4,500 store associates for hybrid digital-physical roles will reduce attrition by 35% and improve NPS by 15 points
slides.source: BCG analysis; company financial disclosures FY2023–FY2025; Euromonitor industry benchmarks
